summary: Stay Pillar Features Testing Complete - All features working correctly. Stay Products (8 bundles), Stay Socials (3 events), and Stay Properties (32 hotels) all display correctly on /stay page. Bundle and Social modals open on click. Review submission API working. 13/13 backend tests passed.
seed_data_creation: 8 stay bundles and 3 pawcation social events seeded

details: Bundles have all required fields (id, name, description, price, items)
Category filter works (travel_kit, anxiety, car_safety, hygiene)
Bundles display on /stay page with discount badges
Bundle modal opens on click showing items and Add to Cart button
Events have all required fields (id, title, event_type, date, time)
Events enriched with property info (property_name, property_city)
Events display on /stay page with Join Event buttons
Properties display with badges, pet fees, and ratings
POST /api/reviews creates review with pending status
Review includes product_id, rating, comment, reviewer info

api_endpoints_verified.GET /api/stay/products/bundles: PASS - Returns 8 bundles with categories and trip_types
api_endpoints_verified.GET /api/stay/social/events: PASS - Returns 3 events with property info
api_endpoints_verified.GET /api/stay/properties: PASS - Returns 32 properties with paw ratings
api_endpoints_verified.POST /api/reviews: PASS - Creates review with pending status

frontend_ui_verified.stay_page_hero: PASS - Hero section with STAY title loads
frontend_ui_verified.stay_essentials_section: PASS - 8 bundle cards with data-testid attributes
frontend_ui_verified.pawcation_socials_section: PASS - 3 event cards with data-testid attributes
frontend_ui_verified.bundle_modal: PASS - Opens on click, shows items and pricing
frontend_ui_verified.event_free_badge: PASS - Shows FREE badge for free events

context_for_next_testing_agent: Stay Pillar features fully functional. StayPage.jsx now renders bundles in 'Stay Essentials' section and socials in 'Pawcation Socials' section. Bundle modal (BundleDetailsModal) and Social modal (SocialDetailsModal) components working. Test file at /app/tests/test_stay_bundles_socials.py covers all Stay APIs. Email sender updated to woof@thedoggybakery.in.
